message: The Customs and Excise Department (C&ED) will issue Cargo Detention Notices through PCS. PCS users who have nominated cargo information on PCS may log in to their PCS accounts to view the relevant alerts and notice information. Existing official issuance arrangements for Cargo Detention Notices and Acknowledgement Receipts remain unchanged.  香港海關將透過港口社區系統（PCS）發出貨櫃扣留通知書。經 PCS 提交貨物資料的用戶可登入其 PCS 帳戶，查閱相關提示和通知書資料。現行扣留通知書的正式發出及簽收回條安排維持不變。
